sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1551" key="a)dwsi/dikos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδωσί-δικος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0011.tlg003.perseus-grc1:354:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">354.6</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0011.tlg003.perseus-grc1:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope> </bibl> B.C.).</entryFree>
